message:
fix(tests): correct busy_timeout assertion to match actual PRAGMA value

Test expected 30000ms but production code sets PRAGMA busy_timeout=60000.
Updated assertion to match the actual 60-second timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -495,8 +495,8 @@ async def test_busy_timeout_set(self, isolated_env):
             )
             timeout = result[0]
 
-        # Should be 30000ms (30 seconds)
-        assert timeout == 30000
+        # Should be 60000ms (60 seconds) to handle sustained write contention
+        assert timeout == 60000
 
     @pytest.mark.asyncio
     async def test_synchronous_mode_normal(self, isolated_env):
